evidence_quotes.quote: predatory live service system that targets gamer, to buy in game items with real money
let customers play games that they bought it.

paragraphs.text: Please also consider in future legislation that game industry basically can delete anytime your game even if you bought anytime they want. Its comparable like a car manufacturer can deactivate anytime your car permanently, despite having ownership to a car. Additionally many game producer add a predatory live service system that targets gamer, to buy in game items with real money....despite all that with on decision from producer side, can render all your time and money investment in games useless over night without any recourse given for customers. So please add in the legislation that protect customers and add also clause that force game publisher to let customers play games that they bought it.
